_comment: EXAMPLE ledger — fictional company Acme AI. Shows the shape a real my-company/evidence-ledger.json should take. DO NOT ship this as your actual ledger; seed your own from my-company/past-performance.md and capabilities.md.

items.summary: On-device LLM inference with no cloud dependency
items.detail: Acme AI platform performs all generative inference on-device. No cloud API calls, no connectivity required during operation. Core architectural property, not a retrofit.

Platform deployed across 4 forward locations supporting 18 operators. Continuous operation March 2025 - April 2026, zero-connectivity mode, no cloud dependency. No unplanned outages; operator-reported utility ratings consistently high.

items.summary: Dr. Jane Doe — PI on three DARPA programs in adjacent topics
items.detail: Principal Investigator for MS3, CCU, and Assured Autonomy. Ten years of neuro-symbolic AI research. TS/SCI clearance. Proposed as technical lead.

items.summary: $4M ARR across non-government customers in regulated sectors
items.detail: Commercial customer base in financial services and healthcare. Supports FAR 2.101 commercial-item determination for CSO procurements.

items.summary: LoRA adapter fine-tuning pipeline delivers specialized adapter in 60 days
items.detail: Measured from adapter spec handoff to operational deployment at prior customer. Four adapter sets delivered across 2025 for different mission sets.

items.summary: FedRAMP Moderate ATO in final stages; IL5 roadmap defined
items.detail: FedRAMP Moderate 3PAO assessment completed Q1 2026; ATO expected Q3 2026. IL5 roadmap targets completion 18 months post-award with detailed plan available. Interim compensating controls documented.

items.summary: Cloud-dependent solutions fail in DDIL operational tempo
items.detail: Even intermittent cloud connectivity — for 'telemetry' or 'model updates' — breaks operational continuity in contested environments. Used to ghost cloud-retrofit competitors without naming them.
